Three sides of the business. One integrated view.

Few executives have led from the agency, team, and brand side of the business. I have. That perspective changes how problems get solved.

I understand how to balance creative ambition with operational realities. How to connect brand strategy to commercial growth. How to align partnerships, marketing, content, and audience around a shared strategy.

I'm brought into moments of transformation when organizations need clearer positioning, stronger alignment, or a more integrated path forward.

What I Do

Services

01
Brand Strategy & Positioning
Clarify what you stand for, who you serve, and why it matters by creating the foundation for growth, partnerships, and audience connection.
02
Partnerships & Commercial Strategy
Turn partnerships into platforms that deliver measurable ROI and cultural resonance.
03
Organizational Alignment & Transformation
Align marketing, partnerships, content, and audience strategy into a roadmap teams can execute against with clarity.
04
Executive Visibility & Industry Influence
Build executive and brand visibility strategies that strengthen credibility, relevance, and industry influence.
05
Advisory & Fractional Leadership
Senior-level strategic counsel for organizations navigating growth, transformation, or complexity.
06
Speaking & Facilitation
Facilitate leadership sessions, panels, and keynote conversations focused on brand, partnerships, leadership, and growth in sports and culture.

The Work

Chicago Blackhawks — Organizational & Brand Transformation

Rebuilding the Brand From the Inside Out

Recruited to the ELT during a pivotal period of transition to redefine the brand, align teams, and reconnect the franchise with fans. Led the franchise's first major campaign in four seasons.

$1.2M generated · $5.2M new partnership business · 96% renewal rate

↗
▶ Watch Film
Tampa Bay Lightning — Cultural Relevance & Fan Growth

Reimagining Fan Connection

During the pandemic, reimagined fan connection transforming the barrier between players and fans into a symbol of community, resilience, and belonging.

10 Clio Sports Awards · SBJ & Clio Team of the Year
↗
▶ Watch Case Study
Sport Chek — Real-Time Brand Activation

Real-Time Olympic Content

600+ pieces of dynamic content created around live Olympic moments. Pre-written poems matched to what unfolded during the Games — turning a single campaign into six real-time ads.

12% sales lift · 34% share of voice · Top-performing Olympic activation in Canada
Verizon — Commercial Innovation & Fan Engagement

Winning the Super Bowl

A Super Bowl campaign built around the second screen, turning fan prediction behavior into the primary experience. Challenged the broadcast-first model and won.

72% of sessions from mobile · +46% YOY · #1 Super Bowl campaign without a TV spot

↗
▶ Watch Film
NASCAR — Brand Architecture

Largest Brand Campaign in NASCAR History

Shaped the strategic narrative and activation framework aligning storytelling, media, and fan engagement around a unified national platform.
USA TODAY Sports — Strategic Positioning & Growth Strategy

Brand Refinement & Women's Sports Expansion

Clarified the brand's role in a rapidly evolving sports landscape, identifying growth opportunities in women's sports and strengthening the foundation for future partnerships.

The Spring — Purpose-Led Growth Strategy

Building the Next 50 Years

Strategic roadmap, campaign platform, and KPI framework guiding the organization toward its 50th anniversary milestone in 2027 — aligning community impact, storytelling, and fundraising.

>
Women's Final Four — Industry Leadership

Advancing the Future of Women's Sports

Brought together leaders from sports, media, and business to advance the conversation around women's NIL, visibility, and long-term value creation by sharing perspectives on one of the biggest growth opportunities in sports.
